name: Masha
intro: Masha, the Wild-oats Fist, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Ancient Strength
abilities.description: Buff Blessed by the Bear King, Masha has 3 HP bars and won't die until all of them are depleted. She can ignore an instance of damage each time she loses an HP bar. When Masha only has two HP bars left, skills will only require 50% of their original HP Cost to cast. When Masha only has one HP bar left, she doesn't need to spend HP to cast skills.

abilities.name: Wild Power
abilities.description: Speed Up Buff Passive: Masha gains Power of the Wild which causes her Basic Attacks to deal extra Physical Damage equal to 1 (+0.5% Extra Physical Attack) % of the target's HP (up to 60 against Creeps and doesn't take effect on Turrets or Base). Active: Masha spends 24% HP to increase her Movement Speed by 60% for 1.5 seconds. She also increases the extra Physical Damage from Power of the Wild by 2–4 (+1% Extra Physical Attack) % of the target's HP and gains 50% extra Attack Speed for her next two Basic Attacks . Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Attack Effect Both Physical and Magic Basic Attacks can trigger Attack Effects Attack Effects include the "Devour" effect of the Demon Hunter Sword equipment, the 'Weakness Finder" Talent effect, etc.

abilities.name: Howl Shock
abilities.description: Debuff AOE Masha spends 24% HP to roar at enemies, dealing 200–300 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and reducing their Attack Speed by 50% for 2 seconds. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Thunderclap
abilities.description: Burst Mobility Masha spends 34% HP to lunge at an enemy hero ( immune to control effects during the lunge ), dealing 200–500 (+200% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage , slowing them by 25% for 2 seconds, and knocking back nearby enemies. The cooldown of this skill will be reset each time Masha loses an HP bar. Skill terms Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Life Recovery
abilities.description: Heal Invincible Masha gains Energy when dealing damage to enemies and extra Energy when dealing damage with Wild Power . After leaving combat for 3 seconds, Masha can activate this skill to spend half a full bar of Energy to recover a full HP bar. Masha is invincible while casting this skill.
